With blessings of Shri Ganesh and our families, we invite you to celebrate a joyful Gujarati wedding filled with mehendi, garba, baraat, sacred pheras, dinner, music, and love.

View Celebrations
hero.designNotes: A full-viewport floral garden romance hero built entirely from CSS. The palette layers blush pinks, soft purples, warm marigold golds, and deep plum — evoking a garden in peak bloom. Large Cormorant Garamond names are rendered with multi-stop gradient fills and a gentle shimmer keyframe. A frosted-glass panel carries the ceremony message with an italic serif voice. Flanking botanical columns are constructed from CSS-only stems, rounded blooms, and leaf shapes, creating a lush framing device without any images. Six petals drift down on staggered infinite animations for living depth. A diamond-and-line ornament system and a four-petal florette provide elegant structural rhythm. The gradient background uses four layered radial + linear stops to avoid any flat wash. While the couple intake listed "modern non-religious" as community, the hero message explicitly invokes Shri Ganesh and Gujarati traditions — so the design honours that cultural warmth through the colour language (marigold, rose, violet) and ceremonial typography while keeping the aesthetic modern and garden-forward rather than templated. Fully responsive across 900px and 640px breakpoints with graceful degradation of botanical complexity on small screens.
